summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Métro-Taxi iteration 5 features: 16 languages in selector, IBAN/BIC bank info for drivers, auto-validation at registration, and admin driver deactivation. All 8 backend tests passed (100%). Frontend testing verified all 16 languages display correctly, Italian/Arabic/Russian work properly, admin dashboard badges translate correctly (ACTIFS, BIENTÔT, EXPIRÉS), and driver registration form includes IBAN/BIC fields with auto-validation message.
passed_tests: Backend: Driver registration with IBAN and BIC - fields stored correctly
Backend: Driver registration without bank info - optional fields work
Backend: PUT /api/drivers/bank-info - update bank info as driver
Backend: Admin can deactivate driver via POST /api/admin/drivers/{id}/deactivate
Backend: Admin can reactivate driver via POST /api/admin/drivers/{id}/validate
Backend: Admin subscriptions endpoint returns badge data
Frontend: 16 languages appear in language selector (FR, EN, EN-GB, DE, NL, ES, PT, IT, NO, SV, DA, ZH, HI, PA, AR, RU)
Frontend: Italian language works - 'IN ABBONAMENTO' subtitle, 'ABBONATI' CTA
Frontend: Arabic language works - 'بالاشتراك' subtitle, Arabic CTA buttons
Frontend: Russian language works - 'ПО ПОДПИСКЕ' subtitle, 'ПОДПИСАТЬСЯ' CTA
Frontend: Admin dashboard badges translated in French - ACTIFS, BIENTÔT, EXPIRÉS
Frontend: Driver registration form has IBAN and BIC/SWIFT fields
Frontend: Driver registration shows auto-validation message
seed_data_creation: Created test drivers with IBAN/BIC during testing (prefixed with TEST_)
context_for_next_testing_agent: All iteration 5 features tested and working: 16 languages in selector (including new IT, AR, RU), IBAN/BIC fields in driver registration, auto-validation of drivers at registration, admin driver deactivation/reactivation, and translated admin dashboard badges (ACTIFS, BIENTÔT, EXPIRÉS in French).
